data.content:
### Role Selection Guidance Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/es/commands/role.md

Illustrates how to use `/role-help` to get guidance on optimal role selection based on specific project concerns or comparisons between roles.

```bash
/role-help "API es lenta y la seguridad también es una preocupación"
→ Proponer enfoque apropiado (multi-rol o debate)

/role-help compare frontend,mobile
→ Diferencias y uso apropiado entre roles frontend y mobile
```

--------------------------------

### Collaboration Examples with Claude

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/fr/commands/plan.md

Illustrates how to collaborate with Claude using Plan Mode for complex tasks like real-time chat features, database design for e-commerce, GraphQL API design, and infrastructure setup with Docker and CI/CD.

```bash
# Complex feature implementation
"Create an implementation plan for the chat feature, including WebSocket, real-time notifications, and history management"
```

```bash
# Database design
"Create a database design plan for an e-commerce site, including product, order, and user management"
```

```bash
# API design
"Create an implementation plan for a GraphQL API, including authentication, caching, and rate limiting"
```

```bash
# Infrastructure design
"Create an implementation plan for Dockerization, including development environment, production environment, and CI/CD"
```

--------------------------------

### Role Help and Guidance

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/en/commands/role.md

Provides examples of using the `role-help` command to get suggestions for role selection or to understand the differences between roles when unsure about the best approach.

```bash
/role-help "API is slow and security is also a concern"
→ Propose appropriate approach (multi-role or debate)

/role-help compare frontend,mobile
→ Differences and appropriate usage between frontend and mobile roles
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Usage Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/fr/commands/smart-review.md

Provides basic examples of using the Smart Review command for different scenarios.

```bash
# Analyze the current directory
/smart-review
"Suggest the optimal role and approach"

# Analyze a specific file
/smart-review src/auth/login.js
"Suggest the best review method for this file"

# Analyze an error log
/smart-review error.log
"Suggest the best approach to resolve this error"
```

--------------------------------

### Plan Mode Workflow Execution Example

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/plan.md

Provides an example of how Plan Mode is expected to function when a request is made, detailing the expected steps from plan generation to user approval and implementation start.

```bash
# 使用例
「ユーザー管理システムの実装計画を立てて」

# 期待される動作
# 1. Plan Mode が自動起動
# 2. 要件分析と技術選定
# 3. 実装ステップの構造化
# 4. exit_plan_mode で計画提示
# 5. 承認後に実装開始
```

--------------------------------

### Install Claude Code Cookbook with Language Support

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/README_zh-tw.md

Instructions for cloning the repository and installing the Claude Code Cookbook, with options to specify the installation language.

```bash
# 複製儲存庫
git clone https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook.git
cd claude-code-cookbook

# 指定語言安裝
./scripts/install.sh ja     # 日文（預設）
./scripts/install.sh en     # 英文
./scripts/install.sh ko     # 韓文
./scripts/install.sh pt     # 葡萄牙文
./scripts/install.sh zh-cn  # 簡體中文
./scripts/install.sh zh-tw  # 繁體中文
./scripts/install.sh es     # 西班牙文
./scripts/install.sh fr     # 法文

```

--------------------------------

### Basic Screenshot and Analysis Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/fr/commands/screenshot.md

Examples demonstrating how to capture screenshots and initiate analysis for different scenarios.

```bash
# Capturer et analyser une fenêtre
/screenshot --window
"Analyze the captured screen"

# Sélectionner une région et analyser
/screenshot --crop
"Explain the content of the selected region"

# Capturer l'écran complet et analyser
/screenshot --full
"Analyze the overall screen composition"
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Spec Creation Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/spec.md

Illustrative examples of how to request specifications for new features, system functionalities, and API functionalities with minimal input.

```bash
# 新機能の spec 作成（最小限入力）
「商品レビューシステム
- 星評価機能
- コメント投稿
- 画像アップロード」

# システム機能の spec 作成
「ユーザー認証
- OAuth 対応
- 多要素認証」

# API 機能の spec 作成
「決済システム API
- Stripe 連携
- セキュリティ重視」
```

--------------------------------

### Detailed Plan Mode Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/fr/commands/plan.md

Offers detailed examples for complex system implementation, frontend development with React, backend RESTful API development, and DevOps CI/CD pipelines.

```bash
# Complex system implementation
"Create an implementation plan for an online payment system, including Stripe integration, security, and error handling"
```

```bash
# Frontend implementation
"Create an implementation plan for a React dashboard, including state management, component design, and testing"
```

```bash
# Backend implementation
"Create an implementation plan for a RESTful API, including authentication, validation, and logging"
```

```bash
# DevOps implementation
"Create an implementation plan for a CI/CD pipeline, including test automation, deployment, and monitoring"
```

--------------------------------

### Practical Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/pt/CLAUDE.md

Illustrates practical application of the principles with examples for bug fixing, refactoring, and database changes.

```text
- Bug Fix: Identify `TypeError` → Immediate correction of the type error
- Refactoring: Duplicate code detected → Extract to a reusable function
- DB Change: Schema change required → Request approval: "Can I alter the table structure?"
```

--------------------------------

### Execution Example and Expected Behavior

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/fr/commands/sequential-thinking.md

Shows an example of executing a sequential thinking prompt and outlines the expected step-by-step behavior from Claude.

```bash
# Example Usage
"Examine GraphQL schema design using sequential-thinking"

# Expected Behavior
# 1. Initial Analysis: Analyze basic requirements for the GraphQL schema
# 2. Hypothesis Generation: Explore various design patterns
# 3. Verification: Check pros and cons of each pattern
# 4. Branching: Explore new approaches as needed
# 5. Integration: Propose an optimal schema design
```

--------------------------------

### Example Execution: Step-by-Step Workflow

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/spec.md

Provides an example of the step-by-step workflow execution, demonstrating user interaction for requirements discovery and phase progression, leading to file generation.

```bash
# 使用例
ユーザー: 「ユーザー管理システムの spec を作成して」

# Phase 1: Requirements Discovery
Claude: [要件の確認と議論開始]
ユーザー: [応答・議論・修正]
Claude: 「Requirements Phase が完了しました。次に進んでよろしいですか？」
ユーザー: 「次に進んで」
→ requirements.md 生成
```

--------------------------------

### Advanced Plan Mode Examples for Collaboration

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/es/commands/plan.md

Illustrates complex scenarios where Plan Mode assists in planning intricate features, database design, API design, and infrastructure setup.

```bash
# Implementación de característica compleja
"Crear un plan de implementación para funcionalidad de chat, incluyendo WebSocket, notificaciones en tiempo real y gestión de historial"
```

```bash
# Diseño de base de datos
"Crear un plan de diseño de base de datos para un sitio de e-commerce, incluyendo gestión de productos, pedidos y usuarios"
```

```bash
# Diseño de API
"Crear un plan de implementación para API GraphQL, incluyendo autenticación, caché y rate limiting"
```

```bash
# Diseño de infraestructura
"Crear un plan de implementación para Dockerización, incluyendo entorno de desarrollo, entorno de producción y CI/CD"
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Role Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/pt/commands/role.md

Provides basic examples of switching to different roles like security, reviewer, performance, analyzer, frontend, and mobile, along with sample commands to initiate analysis.

```bash
# Alternar para modo de auditoria de segurança (normal)
/role security
"Verifique as vulnerabilidades de segurança deste projeto"

# Executar auditoria de segurança com subagente (análise em larga escala)
/role security --agent
"Execute uma auditoria de segurança de todo o projeto"

# Alternar para modo de revisão de código
/role reviewer
"Revise as mudanças recentes e aponte pontos de melhoria"

# Alternar para modo de otimização de performance
/role performance
"Analise os gargalos da aplicação"

# Alternar para modo de análise de causa raiz
/role analyzer
"Investigue a causa raiz desta falha"

# Alternar para modo especializado em frontend
/role frontend
"Avalie os pontos de melhoria de UI/UX"

# Alternar para modo especializado em desenvolvimento mobile
/role mobile
"Avalie a otimização mobile desta aplicação"

# Voltar ao modo normal
/role default
"Retornando ao Claude normal"
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Implementation Plan Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/en/commands/plan.md

Provides examples of how to request implementation plans for common development tasks such as new features, system design, and refactoring.

```bash
# Implementation plan for new feature
"Create an implementation plan for user authentication functionality"
```

```bash
# System design plan
"Create an implementation plan for microservice splitting"
```

```bash
# Refactoring plan
"Create a refactoring plan for legacy code"
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Spec Generation Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/ko/commands/spec.md

Provides simple examples of initiating spec generation for new features, system functionalities, and API features with minimal input.

```bash
# 새 기능의 spec 작성 (최소한 입력)
"상품 리뷰 시스템
- 별점 기능
- 댓글 게시
- 이미지 업로드"
```

```bash
# 시스템 기능의 spec 작성
"사용자 인증
- OAuth 대응
- 다중 인증"
```

```bash
# API 기능의 spec 작성
"결제 시스템 API
- Stripe 연동
- 보안 중시"
```

--------------------------------

### Command Name Output Example

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/COMMAND_TEMPLATE.md

Provides an example of the expected output format and content when using the Command Name command.

```bash
期待される出力フォーマットの例
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

実際の出力内容のサンプル
├─ 項目 1: 値
├─ 項目 2:値
└─ 項目 3:値
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Usage Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/smart-review.md

Provides simple examples of how to use the `smart-review` command for analyzing the current directory, specific files, or error logs.

```bash
# Analyze the current directory
/smart-review
"Suggest the optimal role and approach."

# Analyze a specific file
/smart-review src/auth/login.js
"Suggest the best review method for this file."

# Analyze an error log
/smart-review error.log
"Suggest the best approach to resolve this error."
```

--------------------------------

### Example: Game Development for Beginners

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/spec.md

An example of a novice developer creating a 2D puzzle game overnight by relying on Kiro to handle implementation logic, allowing the developer to focus on creativity.

```bash
「2D パズルゲームの spec を作成して」
→ ゲーム開発未経験のオープンソース開発者
→ 1 晩でゲーム作成完了
→ 実装ロジックは Kiro が処理、開発者は創造性に集中
```

--------------------------------

### Suggestions for Problem Analysis Example

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/en/commands/smart-review.md

Examples of how /smart-review suggests roles and actions for analyzing error logs or performance issues.

```bash
$ /smart-review error.log
→ "⚠️ Error log detected"
→ "Starting root cause analysis with analyzer role"
→ "[Auto-execute] /role analyzer"

$ /smart-review slow-api.log
→ "🐌 Performance issue detected"
→ "Recommended: [1]/role performance [2]/role-debate performance,analyzer"
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Examples of Plan Mode Requests

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/plan.md

Provides simple examples of requests for generating implementation plans for various scenarios like new features, system design, and refactoring.

```bash
# 新機能の実装計画
「ユーザー認証機能の実装計画を立てて」

# システム設計の計画
「マイクロサービス分割の実装計画を立てて」

# リファクタリング計画
「レガシーコードのリファクタリング計画を立てて」
```

--------------------------------

### Example Execution and Expected Behavior

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/pt/commands/sequential-thinking.md

Shows an example of prompting Claude for GraphQL schema design using sequential thinking and outlines the expected step-by-step thought process.

```bash
# Example usage
"Consider GraphQL schema design using sequential-thinking"
```

```bash
# Expected behavior
# 1. Initial analysis: Analyzes basic GraphQL schema requirements
# 2. Hypothesis generation: Considers multiple design patterns
# 3. Verification: Checks advantages and disadvantages of each pattern
# 4. Branching: Explores new approaches as needed
# 5. Integration: Proposes optimal schema design
```

--------------------------------

### Suggestions for Complex Design Decisions Example

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/en/commands/smart-review.md

An example demonstrating how /smart-review suggests roles for complex design decisions, recommending debate formats.

```bash
$ /smart-review architecture-design.md
→ "🏗️🔒⚡ Architecture + Security + Performance elements detected"
→ "For complex design decisions, debate format recommended"
→ "[Recommended] /role-debate architect,security,performance"
→ "[Alternative] /multi-role architect,security,performance"
```

--------------------------------

### Detailed Spec Generation Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/ko/commands/spec.md

Provides examples for generating specs for complex systems like online payment systems, React components, GraphQL APIs, and CI/CD pipelines.

```bash
# 복잡한 시스템 기능
"온라인 결제 시스템의 spec 을 만들어주세요. Stripe 연동, 보안, 오류 처리를 포함해서"
```

```bash
# 프론트엔드 기능
"React 컴포넌트의 spec 을 만들어주세요. 상태 관리, 속성 설계, 테스트를 포함해서"
```

```bash
# 백엔드 기능
"GraphQL API 의 spec 을 만들어주세요. 스키마 설계, 리졸버, 인증을 포함해서"
```

```bash
# DevOps 기능
"CI/CD 파이프라인의 spec 을 만들어주세요. 테스트 자동화, 배포, 모니터링을 포함해서"
```

--------------------------------

### Basic Examples of Smart Review

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/en/commands/smart-review.md

Provides basic usage examples for the /smart-review command, including analyzing the current directory, a specific file, and an error log.

```bash
# Analyze current directory
/smart-review
"Suggest the optimal role and approach"

# Analyze specific file
/smart-review src/auth/login.js
"Suggest the best review method for this file"

# Analyze error log
/smart-review error.log
"Suggest the best approach to resolve this error"
```

--------------------------------

### Advanced Spec Creation Examples with Claude

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/commands/spec.md

Examples of requesting complex specifications for chat features, database integrations, front-end components, and back-end APIs, demonstrating Claude's versatility.

```bash
# 複雑な機能 spec
「チャット機能の spec を作成して。WebSocket、リアルタイム通知、履歴管理を含めて」

# データベース連携機能 spec
「EC サイトの在庫管理機能の spec を作成して。商品追加、在庫更新、アラート機能を含めて」

# フロントエンド機能 spec
「React ダッシュボードの spec を作成して。グラフ表示、フィルター、エクスポート機能を含めて」

# バックエンド機能 spec
「RESTful API の spec を作成して。認証、バリデーション、ログ記録を含めて」
```

--------------------------------

### Check Fact - Project Verification Examples

Source: https://github.com/wasabeef/claude-code-cookbook/blob/main/locales/en/commands/check-fact.md

Provides practical examples of using /check-fact for verifying project specifics like tech stack, feature implementation, architecture, and security setup.

```bash
# Check the tech stack
/check-fact "This app is built with Flutter + Riverpod + GraphQL"

# Check if a feature exists
/check-fact "Dark mode is implemented and can be switched from user settings"

# Check architecture choices
/check-fact "All state management is done with Riverpod, BLoC is not used"

# Check security setup
/check-fact "Authentication tokens are encrypted and stored in secure storage"
```
